name: Matgo -> Slot tiny eval baseline
note: Replace image_path values with recovered NanoBanana2 outputs or regenerated equivalents before using this as a model-quality gate.

contexts.name: Matgo -> Slot playable
contexts.generation_goal: Initial playable ad where Matgo visuals were remixed into a casino slot machine concept.

source_assets.note: Crisp red card face with readable mobile-game silhouette.
Gold card reward treatment that still feels Matgo-adjacent.
Bright coin reward with simple beveled mobile-game lighting.
High-contrast CTA shape, compact and readable.
Slot frame that does not overpower card-game identity.
Celebratory sparkle with restrained casino energy.
Casino chip treatment with flat mobile-game readability.
Reward ribbon using red-gold palette and clean silhouette.

candidates.human_reason: Matches red-gold palette and remains readable as a slot reward.
Direction is right, but lighting is too realistic for existing assets.
Photoreal casino material breaks the Matgo-inspired mobile-game style.
Readable on mobile but needs stronger Korean card-game motifs.
Button and reward treatment are consistent with the reference set.
Busy background would compete with CTA and gameplay objects.
Nice appeal, but crop and layer separation need production cleanup.
Clean silhouette and casino twist fit the playable's visual world.
Color is close but card shape readability is weak at small size.
Character-like render distracts from slot-machine playable interaction.
